---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, one-paragraph description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## To reproduce

Steps that produce the bug. Include the exact CLI command / function call,
the dataset(s) involved, and any non-default arguments.

```bash
selene <command> ...
```

## Environment

- selene-base version (or commit SHA):
- Python version:
- OS:
- Notes (e.g. running inside a venv, GDAL build):

## Logs / screenshots

Paste any error trace, stdout, or screenshots here. Trim to the relevant lines.
